skills.name: Create TeamHub Task
skills.description: Creates a task in TeamHub from email instructions

skills.name: System Change Request
skills.description: Requests system changes (architecture, config, statuses, tags) with Telegram approval gate

skills.name: Remember Prior Context
skills.description: Loads prior email chain context for follow-up processing

skills.name: Manage Files
skills.description: Save, list, or send files from user's NAS workspace

skills.name: Generate Report
skills.description: Generate and email a report to the requesting user

skills.name: Diagnose
skills.description: Diagnose system issues, service failures, and errors. Reads logs, checks service status, traces error paths.

skills.name: Research
skills.description: Research topics using the OPAI codebase, wiki, and available context

skills.name: Explain
skills.description: Explain code, architecture, or OPAI concepts clearly

skills.name: Codebase Search
skills.description: Find files, functions, and patterns across the OPAI codebase
skills.promptTemplate:
Search the OPAI codebase at /workspace/synced/opai for the following. List matching files, relevant code snippets, and their locations.

Search request: {{subject}} {{body}}

skills.name: Service Status
skills.description: Check OPAI service health and uptime

skills.name: DNS Lookup
skills.description: Resolve DNS records for domains (MX, A, NS, TXT)
skills.command: echo '=== MX ===' && dig {{domain}} MX +short; echo '=== A ===' && dig {{domain}} A +short; echo '=== NS ===' && dig {{domain}} NS +short; echo '=== TXT ===' && dig {{domain}} TXT +short

skills.name: Log Analysis
skills.description: Analyze recent service logs for errors and patterns
skills.command: journalctl --user --since '1 hour ago' --no-pager --priority=err 2>/dev/null | tail -50; echo '---WARN---'; journalctl --user --since '1 hour ago' --no-pager --priority=warning 2>/dev/null | tail -30
